parameters.content:
## YouTube Video Intelligence Tracker — YouTube API + WayinVideo + GPT-4o-mini + Sheets + Gmail

For content marketers, SEO strategists, and research teams who want structured intelligence from YouTube videos — not just auto-captions, but real speaker-labeled transcripts with GPT analysis tailored to your niche. Submit up to 3 YouTube URLs via the form. The workflow fetches title, channel, views, and duration from the YouTube Data API, submits each video to WayinVideo for accurate transcription, then sends the transcript to GPT-4o-mini for a 6-field analysis: summary, key topics, best quote, target audience, a relevance score for your niche, and a content gap your competitors missed. All results are logged to Google Sheets and emailed in a single report sorted by relevance.

## How it works
- **1. Form — YouTube Video Intelligence** collects up to 3 YouTube video URLs and your name
- **2. Set — Config Values** stores both API keys, Sheet ID, email, niche, and form values
- **3. Code — Extract Video IDs** parses video IDs from youtube.com and youtu.be URL formats and outputs one item per video
- **4. HTTP — Fetch YouTube Metadata** calls the YouTube Data API v3 for title, channel, views, duration, and published date
- **5. Code — Process Video Metadata** formats ISO 8601 duration to readable text and adds comma-formatted view counts
- **6. HTTP — Submit Transcription Task** sends each video URL to WayinVideo for real speaker-labeled transcription
- **7. Code — Save Transcript Task ID** saves the task ID and initializes the poll counter
- **8–11. Transcription Polling Loop** polls every 45 seconds until SUCCEEDED — up to 15 polls (11 minutes). Groups transcript by speaker. Falls back to video description if empty
- **13. AI Agent — Analyze Video** uses GPT-4o-mini to return summary, key topics, best quote, target audience, relevance score for your niche, and content gap
- **16. Code — Prepare Results** formats all fields and adds a High/Medium/Low score label
- **17. Google Sheets — Log Video Analysis** logs one row per video permanently
- **18. IF — Last Video?** gates the Gmail report so it fires exactly once after all videos are logged
- **19. Code — Build Gmail Report** collects all video results, sorts by relevance score, and builds the email
- **20. Gmail — Send Intelligence Report** delivers the complete report to your inbox

## Set up steps
1. In **2. Set — Config Values** — replace PASTE_YOUR_YOUTUBE_DATA_API_KEY_HERE (from Google Cloud Console, enable YouTube Data API v3), PASTE_YOUR_WAYINVIDEO_API_KEY_HERE (from wayin.ai Account Settings), PASTE_YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEET_ID_HERE, PASTE_YOUR_EMAIL_HERE, PASTE_YOUR_NAME_HERE, and set yourNiche to your industry
2. In **14. OpenAI — GPT-4o-mini Model** — connect your OpenAI credential
3. In **17. Google Sheets — Log Video Analysis** — connect your Google Sheets OAuth2 credential
4. In **20. Gmail — Send Intelligence Report** — connect your Gmail OAuth2 credential
5. Create a Google Sheet tab named YouTube Intelligence with columns: Date, Video URL, Title, Channel, Views, Duration, Published, Summary, Key Topics, Best Quote, Target Audience, Relevance Score, Content Gap, Submitted By, Logged At

nodes.name: Section — Form Input, Config, and Video ID Extraction

parameters.content:
## Form Input, Config, and Video ID Extraction
User submits up to 3 YouTube video URLs. Config stores both API keys, sheet settings, email, and niche. A Code node extracts video IDs from both youtube.com and youtu.be URL formats and outputs one item per valid video.

nodes.name: Section — YouTube Metadata Fetch and WayinVideo Submission

parameters.content:
## YouTube Metadata Fetch and WayinVideo Transcription Submission
YouTube Data API v3 fetches title, channel, views, duration (converted from ISO 8601), and published date. WayinVideo receives the video URL for real speaker-labeled transcription. Task ID is saved for polling.

## Transcription Polling Loop
Polls WayinVideo every 45 seconds until SUCCEEDED. Groups transcript segments by speaker. Falls back to video description if transcript is empty. Caps at 5000 characters for GPT. Loops back via Set node to preserve all data. Hard timeout after 15 polls (approximately 11 minutes).

## AI Video Analysis
GPT-4o-mini (temperature 0.2) analyzes the transcript and returns 6 fields: a 3–4 sentence summary, 5 key topics, the best quote, target audience, a relevance score from 1 to 10 for your niche, and a content gap your competitors missed.

nodes.name: Section — Results Assembly, Sheet Logging, and Gmail Report

parameters.content:
## Results Assembly, Sheet Logging, and Gmail Report
Prepares all fields with score labels. Google Sheets logs one row per video. The IF node checks isLastVideo — only the final video triggers Gmail. The report collects all processed videos using .all(), sorts by relevance score, and emails a complete intelligence digest.

parameters.formDescription: Analyze up to 3 YouTube videos at once. Get structured summaries, key topics, best quotes, and relevance scores. All saved to Google Sheets and emailed to you.

parameters.text:
=You are a content intelligence analyst for a {{ $json.yourNiche }} professional.

Analyze this YouTube video and return ONLY a valid JSON object. No extra text. No markdown. No backticks.

Video details:
Title: {{ $json.title }}
Channel: {{ $json.channel }}
Views: {{ $json.views }}
Duration: {{ $json.duration }}
Published: {{ $json.publishedDate }}
URL: {{ $json.originalUrl }}

Transcript:
{{ $json.transcriptText }}

Return exactly these 6 fields:

summary
3 to 4 sentences summarizing what this video covers. Be specific — mention the actual topics and any key data points. Under 80 words.

keyTopics
An array of exactly 5 strings. The most important topics, concepts, or tactics covered in this video. Each under 8 words.

bestQuote
The single most memorable or insightful statement from the transcript. One sentence under 25 words. If no clear quote is found write: No standout quote identified.

targetAudience
One sentence describing who this video is most useful for. Under 15 words.

relevanceScore
A number from 1 to 10 showing how relevant this video is for a {{ $json.yourNiche }} professional.
10 means directly actionable and highly relevant.
7 to 9 means strong relevance with useful insights.
4 to 6 means general interest or partial relevance.
1 to 3 means low relevance for this niche.

contentGap
One thing this video did NOT cover that would make it more useful for a {{ $json.yourNiche }} professional. One sentence under 20 words.

assignments.name: result
assignments.value: More videos still being processed — loop continues.
